topic: Myth: 'Nobody in a small town searches online'
caption:
Small town does not mean small search traffic.
People in Victorville and Apple Valley Google plumbers, barbers, and cleaners every day.
If you're not showing up, someone else is.
We build websites that put High Desert businesses on the map.
Link in bio to get started.

#HighDesert #Victorville #AppleValley #Hesperia #SmallBusiness #SmallBusinessOwner #WebDesign #LocalSEO #VeteranOwned #WebsiteDesign #ShopLocal #HighDesertBusiness
alt_text: Bold text graphic reading the myth that small towns do not search online, with a correction and the BuildMyWebNow branding below.

copy.myth: Nobody in a small town searches online
copy.fact: Your neighbors Google everything, including local businesses
copy.body: High Desert residents search for local services daily. If you have no website, a competitor with one gets that call.
